examples: "Forever," says one girl with a bandana over her face.
A bandana is good head protection and is an all around useful item to have.
I turned on the little red bandana dimbulb and we poured wine and all sat around talking.
Over six feet, he wore a Jordan flag as a bandana across his brow.
Earlier in the day, when Forney pulled over Loughner driving a dark-colored Chevy, Loughner removed a bandana from his head.
